name: Tzatziki Sauce for Gyros
recipeInstructions:
Use fresh mint leaves, shredded, 2 tablespoons dried mint, crushed, or 1/4 cup coarsely chopped flat-leaf parsley. Use more or less garlic, minced, to your preference.
Peel and seed the cucumbers, then dice them. Sprinkle with salt and set aside to drain.
In a large bowl, combine yogurt, olive oil, fresh lemon juice, white pepper, and garlic. Stir until well mixed.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Just before serving, beat the yogurt sauce with a wooden spoon until smooth.
Tear mint leaves into small pieces and dry cucumber between paper towels.
Combine cucumbers, mint, and yogurt mixture. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Use this tzatziki sauce for Gyros in this book or as dippers with pita bread cut into wedges and baked for a few minutes until crisp.
